---
pagetitle: "The Five Galaxies"
description: "A system-agnostic space opera setting bible"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
format-links: false
---

::: {.text-center .py-5}
# The Five Galaxies

**A system-agnostic space opera setting bible**

Five galaxies. Three million light-years of contested space. One crumbling network holding it together.
:::

---

::: {.grid .gap-4 .py-4}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .p-4 .h-100}
#### The Setting

The Local Group spans five connected galaxies — the Milky Way, Andromeda, Triangulum, and the Magellanic Clouds. Each is politically distinct. Each is described at the level of powers, pressures, and available stories.

[Start with the Introduction →](setting/the_five_galaxies.html)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .p-4 .h-100}
#### Species & Factions

Dozens of species. Empires built on denial and debt. Factions that operate across galaxy lines. Humans are a minor player.

[Major Species →](setting/the_five_galaxies.html#major-species) · [Factions →](setting/the_five_galaxies.html#major-factions)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .p-4 .h-100}
#### Infrastructure

The Wormhole Access Network binds charted space together — and access can be revoked. Oddspace is the FTL medium ships traverse at cost and risk. Both are leverage.

[Travel & Trade →](setting/the_five_galaxies.html#travel-and-trade) · [Technology →](setting/the_five_galaxies.html#technology-and-resources)
:::
:::

:::

---

::: {.text-muted .small .text-center}
Derived from *Plerion: The Five Galaxies* by Roberto Bisceglie — [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)
:::
